title: PrePvP
body:
Ever wanted a PvP texture pack that keeps that crisp pre-1.14 texture feel? Well, here it is!

# Features
**Vanilla Aesthetics:**
Retains the classic and beloved visual style of Minecraft 1.8.9 while enhancing the PvP experience.

**Shorter Swords:**
Optimized sword models for a sleek and compact appearance, ensuring a clear view of the battlefield without compromising functionality.

**Transparent GUI:**
Enjoy an unobstructed view of your surroundings with a transparent graphical user interface (GUI), keeping your focus on the action without sacrificing essential information.

*GUI by [Vanilla Tweaks](https://vanillatweaks.net/). I know its bugged and I'm in the process of fixing it. Might have to remove it for a while possibly.*
